nodes.label: Stage 5 Balance Tuning Log (full evidence trail)
Oaths System — public breakable two-player political bond
nodes.rationale: R3 focus group diagnosed game as 'emotionally thin — no relationship persists or can be betrayed.' Oaths absorb Rescue: rescue auto-forges an Oath. The Ledger (grudge array) remembers oathbreakers; the dark hunts traitors. ~6.4 sworn/3.2 broken per game.

nodes.label: Blood Pact Accusation System — suspicion log + unanimous unanimous accusation gamble
nodes.rationale: Traitor faces cover-vs-sabotage dilemma. 'None'-only suspicion signal (not 'low') gives ~71% accuracy. ACCUSATION_WRONG_PENALTY=2 is sim-inert but human-facing deterrent. Accusation requires unanimous agreement from all other players.

nodes.label: Sealed Pledge — gambit claimant's pledge is concealed (volunteer's dilemma)
nodes.rationale: Makes Gambit a genuine bet — rivals can't reliably bail out the claimant. Cuts claimant Gambit-win by 7pp, gambit fire 26%→18% (in-band). Validated via bail-out AI in Stage B. The felt drama is human-only, recorded in playtest checklist.

nodes.label: Herald Lone-Runner Piece — literal independent marching piece
nodes.rationale: Built on user request 'build the literal lone-runner now.' New PieceType 'herald' marches independently; PARLEY fires from runner's node. Rival Warlord or Death Knight co-located at Dawn captures it. Generates table drama: 'will he make it?'

nodes.label: Forge-as-Gate Tolls — entering a rival-owned Forge costs a banner toll
Dark Hunt / Dark Engagement — Hunt verb + win-currency DK kill
nodes.rationale: R2 focus group ruled dormant DK-engagement (dkKills=0.00) a structural inverted incentive. Fix: Hunt verb (AI paths toward DK), win-currency kill (claim DK's node), asymmetric grudge Mark (only leading seats pay tax), DK blocks CLAIM. DK-kills 0.00→2.05/game.

nodes.label: §9 Balance Targets — SK win 18-22%, rounds 10-16, gambit 10-20%, rescues 2-4
Per-Count Difficulty Ladder — 2p Duel / 3p Triumvirate / 4p Carve-up
nodes.rationale: Structural finding: per-count ±5pp flatness is unreachable by number-tuning (pledge supply scales with player count). Decision A: accept monotonic gradient and ship as named identity ladder. Pooled 18-22% SK-win is the per-count contract.

edges.source_location: Oaths + Ledger — rescue absorbed into one Oath
Stage S — sealed gambit pledge fires through pledge machinery
5-dark section — engagement with SK's Death Knights
Stage T — sworn allies pass Forge toll free
§HL — Herald piece realizes the lone-runner narrative the Diplomatic Action implies
§5e — accusation system is part of Blood Pact mode

hyperedges.label: Social Engine — Oaths + Rescue + Blood Pact + Voting create political relationships
hyperedges.description: The four social mechanics interact: rescuing auto-forges an Oath, Oaths create non-aggression that affects Voting behavior, Blood Pact saboteurs manipulate Voting patterns, and Voting itself is the primary political arena. Together they produce the 'Priya saved me even though she suspected me' emergent stories.
